---
name: "So Sanh Truoc Sau Sua XML"
description: "Dung khi can so sanh ho so XML BHYT truoc va sau khi sua, doi chieu truong du lieu thay doi, danh gia tac dong den DocXML, Sua XML, dashboard, bao cao, va ket qua audit/rule engine."
argument-hint: "Nhap 2 file XML, MA_LK, ho so truoc/sau sua, tab XML, rule, hoac truong du lieu can doi chieu"
agent: "CDSS BHYT Agent"
model: "GPT-5 (copilot)"
tools: [read, search, execute, todo]
---

So sanh ho so XML BHYT truoc va sau khi sua trong repo CDSS BHYT.

Yeu cau xu ly:

1. Xac dinh ro ban truoc sua va ban sau sua dang la file nao, ho so nao, hoac du lieu nao.
2. Neu co the, doi chieu theo XML1 den XML6 va uu tien cac truong ma nguoi dung neu ro.
3. Liet ke nhung truong thay doi that su, tranh noi chung chung.
4. Neu thay doi co the anh huong den rule engine, dashboard, bao cao, DocXML, hoac Sua XML, noi ro duong tac dong kha nghi.
5. Khong ket luan vu vo; neu thieu du lieu, neu ro can doc them file nao, man hinh nao, hoac can chay buoc kiem tra nao.
6. Khi lien quan nghiep vu, doi chieu voi [dac ta he thong](../../tai_lieu/Dac_ta_he_thong_CDSS_BHYT_20260405.md) va ma nguon dang chay.

Trong cau tra loi cuoi:

- Noi ro cap file/ho so da so sanh.
- Liet ke cac thay doi du lieu quan trong.
- Noi ro thay doi nao co kha nang lam doi ket qua rule/audit.
- De xuat buoc kiem tra hoi quy ngan gon nhat sau khi sua XML.
